name: telegram-crypto-market-bot
description: Telegram bot that reviews TRC20 addresses and assesses their risk level.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/bot.js && node --check src/handlers/commandHandler.js && node --check src/handlers/messageHandler.js && node --check src/validator/trc20.js && node --check src/validator/checksum.js && node --check src/utils/logger.js && node --check src/utils/formatter.js
